notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Steer reaches on a fielder's choice. JJ Bleday scores. Sal Stewart to 3rd. Nathaniel Lowe to 2nd. Fielding error by pitcher Lucas Giolito.

notableEvents.label: Dane Myers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dane Myers singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Jackson Merrill.

notableEvents.label: Dane Myers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dane Myers flies out to right fielder Jase Bowen.

notableEvents.label: Freddy Fermin GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Freddy Fermin grounds into a double play, first baseman Nathaniel Lowe to catcher Tyler Stephenson to first baseman Nathaniel Lowe. Will Wagner out at home. Freddy Fermin out at 1st.
